candidate_check.description: The Apache web server must generate, at a minimum, log records for system startup and shutdown, system access, and system authentication events.

check_content_excerpt:
In a command line, navigate to "<'INSTALLED PATH'>\bin". Run "httpd -M" to view a list of installed modules.

If the "log_config_module" is not enabled, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Uncomment the "log_config_module" module line in the <'INSTALL PATH'>\conf\httpd.conf file.

Restart the Apache service.
title: The Apache web server must generate, at a minimum, log records for system startup and shutdown, system access, and system authentication events.
